name: Import Cost Sheet
html:
Name of Tax Payer:{{ doc.tax_payer or '' }}Commercial Invoice{{ doc.commercial_invoice_no or '' }}
TIN Number:{{ doc.tin_number or '' }}Bill of Lading{{ doc.bl_number or '' }}
Declaration Number:{{ doc.declaration_number or '' }}FCY Rate{{ doc.fcy_rate or '' }}
Description of Imported Item:{{ doc.item_description or '' }}Invoice Value (FCY){{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.invoice_value_fcy or 0) }}
Bank Permit Number:{{ doc.bank_permit_number or '' }}Supplier{{ doc.supplier_name or doc.supplier or '' }}
Customs Base Value (DVP):{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.dvp_value or 0) }}Country of Origin{{ doc.origin_country or '' }}
{%- for c in doc.charges %} {%- endfor %}
s/nDescriptionCustoms Invoice PriceAmount In ETB
{{ c.sn or loop.index }}{{ c.description }}{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(c.customs_amount) if c.customs_amount else '' }}{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(c.etb_amount) if c.etb_amount else '' }}
Total{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.customs_total or 0) }}{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.etb_total or 0) }}
Custom Valuation Variance{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.cvd_amount or 0) }}
5200PURCHASE{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.purchase_total or 0) }}
2400CVD{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.cvd_amount or 0) }}
1420GIT{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.git_amount or 0) }}
1440{{ doc.supplier_name or doc.supplier or 'SUPPLIER' }}{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.supplier_payable or 0) }}

Item Landed Cost Allocation

{%- for a in doc.item_allocation %} {%- endfor %}
QTYDescriptionUnit PriceTotal
{{ (a.qty or 0)|int }}{{ a.description or a.item_code }}{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(a.landed_unit_cost or 0) }}{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(a.landed_total or 0) }}
